active_generation.name: M
active_generation.base_execution_provider: m2_shared_lookup_linear (EXACT parity to Gen-F direct-compact: logit cos 1.0, next-token 1.0; lowers FLOPs/movement/dispatches, quality-neutral)

source.checkpoint_format: ORIGINAL OpenAI format (tensor names block.N.mlp.mlp1_weight.blocks), NOT HF transformers naming; transformers.from_pretrained cannot load it directly -> repo's byte-range ProvenanceReader is the loader
source.tokenizer: tokenizer.json (tokenizers lib loads; vocab 200019 active / 201088 nominal) + chat_template.jinja (Harmony)
source.architecture: 36 layers x 128 experts x top-k4; hidden 2880; intermediate 2880; GQA 64Q/8KV head_dim 64; rope_theta 150000; sliding_window 128; swiglu_limit 7.0

environment.transformers: 5.6.2 (gpt_oss architecture PRESENT; used as the parity math reference, cannot load original-format 120B)
environment.default_python3_warning: the shell default python3 is Homebrew 3.14.5 with NO torch/transformers; the controllers require the 3.12 framework interpreter

science_truth.verdict: NEGATIVE and converging at sub-bit; no Event Horizon; no capability pass anywhere

g3_reality.note: assembling a real complete layer costs 2.1-3.25 BPW, NOT sub-bit

science_truth.all_forwards_to_date: APPROXIMATION / synthetic-Harmony-token / relative orig-vs-packed divergence only. The repo's own _swiglu is non-parity (split-half + plain SiLU); correct only for RELATIVE comparison where the wrong activation cancels. NO real logits, PPL, or coherent generation has ever been produced in this campaign.
science_truth.generation_m_mechanics: RUN_ALL_COMPLETE; champions are speed/representation wins (2.5-3.3x lookup-linear at zero quality cost) that only apply once a quality-POSITIVE representation exists (none does).

g4_feasibility.required: HF-validated full-model forward: real logits, logit_kl, topk_overlap, next_token_agreement, PPL/NLL, deterministic gen (quality contract end_to_end tier)
g4_feasibility.naive_transformers: STRUCTURAL OOM on 96GB: mxfp4->bf16 dequant of 120B ~= 234GB; and the checkpoint is OpenAI-format so transformers cannot load it directly regardless
g4_feasibility.chosen_route: extend the PROVEN bounded-streaming per-expert loader (gptoss_moe_runtime.py selftest green on real source: experts_loaded 4, forward_out_finite true) to a full 36-layer real forward with the CORRECT gpt-oss activation (interleaved gate/up, clamp 7, alpha 1.702, (up+1)*glu) + final norm + unembed + real tokenizer
g4_feasibility.memory: BOUNDED (stream one block + a handful of experts at a time; ~65GB read per forward; NO offload needed; fits 96GB comfortably)
g4_feasibility.parity_reference: transformers 5.6.2 modeling_gpt_oss.py (activation, router softmax-over-topk, attention sinks -> repo attention already matches; RoPE + gate/up interleave ordering validated empirically by coherent next-token prediction)
g4_feasibility.validity_gate: coherent next-token prediction on real English/code prompts = empirical parity validator; garbage output => convention wrong => fix and retry

685B.eligible_when: 120B G3(done) + one full-rank family + one Doctor path + frozen contract + Apple exec + whole-artifact projection + (CUDA parity OR blocked receipt)

1T.eligible_when: 120B G5-or-boundary + 685B parent-bound F2 + Kimi source authority + text/full claim separation
